query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.image_url, pi.image_url as pi_url
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_images pi ON pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_primary = true
WHERE p.image_url IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10;
